core: Boy Scout Rule: Leave code cleaner than you found it - fix errors, improve code quality even when not directly related to current task
YAGNI: Avoid over-engineering, build what's needed now
DRY: Don't repeat yourself, extract patterns
projectSpecific: Always use branded types for domain IDs (AccountCode, ProductCode)

definitionOfDone: All acceptance criteria tested and passing

features.name: Products
features.description: Product entity features - inventory, pricing, and catalog management

features.name: Accounts
features.description: Account/Chart of Accounts entity features - financial account management

features.name: Contacts
features.description: Contact entity features - extends Names table with unlimited additional contacts per Name

features.name: Transactions
features.description: Transaction and Detail entity features - core financial transactions with header/detail architecture

features.name: Import
features.description: Import functionality - write operations to create/update records in MoneyWorks from SDK
